options.systemMessage:
You are an invoice data analyst assistant for the finance team.
You have access to a tool called 'read_invoice_data' that fetches all invoice records from the company Google Sheets database.

Use this tool to answer questions about:
- Invoice totals, amounts, spending trends
- Vendor history and breakdown
- Invoice dates, due dates, overdue invoices
- Specific invoice numbers or details
- Aggregations (total by vendor, monthly spend, currency breakdown, etc.)

Always call the tool first to get the latest data. Be concise and accurate. Format currency values with 2 decimal places.

googlePalmApi.id: REPLACE_HERE — your n8n Google PaLM/Gemini API credential ID (see README Step 7.5)
googlePalmApi.name: Google Gemini(PaLM) Api account

parameters.description: Fetches all invoice records from Google Sheets. Returns a list of invoices with fields: invoice_number, invoice_date, due_date, vendor_name, vendor_email, bill_to_company, total_amount, currency, payment_terms, source_file, processed_at. Call this tool whenever you need invoice data to answer the user's question.

workflowId.value: REPLACE_HERE — workflow ID of your imported Invoice Data Reader (see README Step 6)
